name: io.github.justapileofashes/media-gen
description: MCP server for Claude Code: free Claude-authored image/video rendering (SVG/HTML/canvas, no API keys) plus optional BYOK photoreal generation via OpenAI, Gemini, or fal.ai.

environmentVariables.name: MEDIA_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Output directory for generated media (optional; defaults to ./generated-media)

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (optional; enables generate_image/generate_video via gpt-image-1/Sora)

environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Gemini API key (optional; enables generate_image/generate_video via Imagen/Veo)

environmentVariables.name: FAL_KEY
environmentVariables.description: fal.ai API key (optional; enables generate_image/generate_video via FLUX/Kling)
